0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Impact:

An attacker could execute remote code on a system running wwbn/avideo

Step to Reproduce:

1. Go to the `My Videos` tab

https://demo.avideo.com/mvideos

2. Click "Embed a video link"

Append a command to the url as a query string. eg. `?whoami`


then click Save

This issue has been resolved in commit `236228f15`", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01315, "percentile": 0.67509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw", "github_reviewed_at": "2023-02-02T01:32:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2023-25313"}], "nvd_published_at": "2023-04-25T22:15:09Z", "published_at": "2023-02-02T01:32:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/security/advisories/GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw", "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/commit/236228f15a9a31be5a0e60f05dac043682e49a5e", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-30842", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WWBN/AVideo/security-advisories/GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo", "summary": "AVideo contains Command injection when embedding a video link", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T14:35:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pgvh-p3g4-86jw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "12.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "wwbn/avideo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 12.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: AVideo contains Command injection when embedding a video link
